response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, Git) and excels in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud integration (AWS CDK), and testing practices (Vitest/Jest equivalents). His open-source contributions, architecture versatility, and proven ability to deliver end-to-end solutions across diverse domains make him a standout candidate despite limited explicit Nest.js exposure.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling development
Strong testing culture and open-source contributions demonstrating craftsmanship and initiative
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js in resume, though Node.js and architecture skills are strong
Limited evidence of direct experience with Vitest or Playwright (though testing expertise is clear)
German language proficiency is only basic, which may impact local collaboration in Berlin
